summary: The diff implements a comprehensive multi-page LUCKY HOLIDAYS Tours & Travels website with all five pages (Home, About, Vehicles, Contact, Ratings), a consistent header/footer, backend for ratings/reviews, and warm travel-themed styling. Nearly all requirements are well-covered. The contact form is present but does not appear to submit to a backend (only client-side state). The ratings/reviews backend is implemented via Motoko. Minor gap: the Vehicles page uses a shared placeholder image for all vehicle cards rather than individual vehicle images, which is acceptable per the spec. No significant hallucinated features beyond a footer (reasonable addition) and an optional phone field in the contact form.

hallucinated_features.description: Contact form includes an optional phone number field beyond the required name, email, and message fields
hallucinated_features.reason: REQ-5 specifies only name, email, and message fields for the contact form. The diff adds a phone field not requested.

hallucinated_features.description: Footer component with quick links, contact info, and caffeine.ai attribution
hallucinated_features.reason: The build request does not specify a footer component; this is an addition beyond the stated requirements.
